---
title: ""
---

```{=html}
<video autoplay muted loop playsinline 
         style="width: 100%; max-width: 1000px; height: auto; display: block; border: none;">
```

<source src="contact.mp4" type="video/mp4">
</video>

I am always looking for ways to collaborate, please feel free to reach me using any of the following:

-   📧 Email: adrodriguez\@msm.edu \| annydrodriguez7\@gmail.com
-   🔗 <a href="https://linkedin.com/in/annydrodriguez" target="_blank">LinkedIn Profile</a>
-   🔗 <a href="https://github.com/annyrodriguez" target="_blank">Github Profile</a>
-   Currently at: 🏛 Morehouse School of Medicine
